page_content:
Prerequisite: Completion of all core courses.

Restriction: Permission of INFO-College of Information Studies; and permission of instructor.

Repeatable to: 9 credits.

Additional Information: A student may complete no more than 9 credits registered under 709 or a total of 12 credits registered under 708 and 709.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]
